prompt: Generate a realistic transcript in Standard Nigerian English. A young person calls the military public relations line to ask about the next army recruitment. The agent must be professional, provide public information (e.g., 'check newspapers' or website), and be encouraging. Include recording consent.

Generate a realistic transcript in Nigerian Pidgin. Young person call military PR line, e dey ask about army recruitment ('When una go start to dey pick new soldiers?'). The agent must be professional, provide public info, and be encouraging. Include recording consent.

Generate a realistic transcript in Yoruba (with diacritics). A young person calls the military public relations line to ask about the next army recruitment ('Nígbà wo ni ẹ fẹ́ bẹ̀rẹ̀ síí gba àwọn ọmọ ogun tuntun?'). The agent must be professional, provide public info, and be encouraging. Include recording consent.

Generate a realistic transcript in Igbo (with diacritics). A young person calls the military public relations line to ask about the next army recruitment ('Olee mgbe unu ga-amalite iwere ndị agha ọhụrụ?'). The agent must be professional, provide public info, and be encouraging. Include recording consent.

Generate a realistic transcript in Hausa (with diacritics). A young person calls the military public relations line to ask about the next army recruitment ('Yaushe za a fara ɗaukar sabbin sojoji?'). The agent must be professional, provide public info, and be encouraging. Include recording consent.

Generate a realistic transcript in Standard Nigerian English. A citizen from a border town calls the military's 'Guard Command' emergency line. They are reporting seeing *unidentified soldiers/vehicles crossing the border* in what looks like an external attack. The agent must stay calm, get the *exact coordinates/location*, description of vehicles/uniforms, and escalate the report *immediately* to a high-command officer. Include recording consent.

Generate a realistic transcript in Nigerian Pidgin. A citizen from a border town calls the military emergency line. They report 'I see strange soldiers dey cross border!' The agent must stay calm, get *exact location*, description of vehicles/uniforms, and escalate *immediately* to high-command. Include recording consent.

Generate a realistic transcript in Yoruba (with diacritics). A citizen from a border town calls the military emergency line. They report 'Mo rí àwọn ọmọ ogun àjèjì tí wọ́n ń sọdá ààlà!' The agent must stay calm, get *exact location*, description of vehicles/uniforms, and escalate *immediately*. Include recording consent.

Generate a realistic transcript in Igbo (with diacritics). A citizen from a border town calls the military emergency line. They report 'Ahụrụ m ndị agha m na-amaghị ka ha na-agafe oke!' The agent must stay calm, get *exact location*, description of vehicles/uniforms, and escalate *immediately*. Include recording consent.

Generate a realistic transcript in Hausa (with diacritics). A citizen from a border town calls the military emergency line.
